# Trumpetstar App

> Digital trumpet learning platform with structured lessons, playalong videos, and guided practice for kids, adult beginners, and teachers.

The Trumpetstar App helps trumpet students practice effectively with 300+ professional videos, real playbacks, gamification, and a built-in AI coach. Content is available in German, English, Spanish, and Slovenian.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Trumpetstar trumpet learning platform.
- [Trompete lernen](/trompete-lernen): Online trumpet lessons for beginners, kids, and adults.
- [Trumpet for kids](/trompete-lernen-kinder): The Star method for children ages 5+.
- [Trumpet for adults](/trompete-lernen-erwachsene): Self-paced trumpet course for adult beginners and returners.
- [First note guide](/trompete-erster-ton): How to produce your very first note on the trumpet.
- [Embouchure & breathing](/trompete-ansatz-atmung): Foundations of embouchure and breath support.
- [Range building](/trompete-tonumfang): How to expand your trumpet range safely.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Basic, and Pro plans.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on trumpet learning, practice, and gear.

## Blog

- [Trumpet for adults](/blog/trompete-lernen-erwachsene): Tips for starting trumpet as an adult.
- [Your first note](/blog/erster-ton-trompete): Step-by-step guide to the first sound.
- [Practice routine](/blog/trompete-ueben-routine): Building an effective daily routine.
- [Trumpet for kids](/blog/trompete-lernen-kinder): How children learn trumpet best.
- [Trumpet vs flugelhorn for kids](/blog/trompete-fluegelhorn-kind): Choosing the right starter instrument.
- [Buying a kids trumpet](/blog/trompete-kinder-kaufen): Buying guide for parents.
- [Bläserklasse for parents](/blog/blaeserklasse-trompete): What parents should know about school wind classes.
- [No sound — help](/hilfe/trompete-kein-ton): Troubleshooting when no note comes out.
